use_cases: Displaying code snippets with one-click copy-to-clipboard functionality
Showing status messages (success, warning, error) in inline formats
Presenting configuration examples or command-line instructions
Creating reusable inline text blocks with visual variants
Building documentation or help interfaces with copyable content
ai_summary: A lightweight copyable text snippet component with multiple visual variants (default, inverted, success, warning, error) and built-in clipboard functionality. Features a click-to-copy interaction with a 2-second animation feedback, making it ideal for displaying code examples, status messages, or any copyable inline content in developer tools or SaaS applications.
